allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8086/api/v2/write?org=iot&bucket=sensors&precision=ms' -H 'Authorization: Token ZEFqwNspJYEQ8HAucne-PUUHohOsl18e8nRfu_3q0_o3Z_qoluzc3Od_f8w32MSCir0CBDhm5AyGpF8soK3clQ==' -H 'Content-Type: text/plain' --data-binary 'sensor_data,device=TEST temperature=25.0,humidity=60.0' -w '\\nHTTP Status: %{http_code}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8086/api/v2/query?org=iot' -H 'Authorization: Token ZEFqwNspJYEQ8HAucne-PUUHohOsl18e8nRfu_3q0_o3Z_qoluzc3Od_f8w32MSCir0CBDhm5AyGpF8soK3clQ==' -H 'Content-Type: application/vnd.flux' --data 'from\(bucket:"sensors"\) |> range\(start:-5m\) |> limit\(n:3\)')

Bash(curl -s -X POST 'http://localhost:8086/api/v2/query?org=iot' -H 'Authorization: Token ZEFqwNspJYEQ8HAucne-PUUHohOsl18e8nRfu_3q0_o3Z_qoluzc3Od_f8w32MSCir0CBDhm5AyGpF8soK3clQ==' -H 'Content-Type: application/vnd.flux' --data 'from\(bucket:"sensors"\) |> range\(start:-2m\) |> filter\(fn:\(r\) => r._measurement == "sensor_data"\) |> filter\(fn:\(r\) => r._field == "temperature"\) |> last\(\)')
